The antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties of Neobartlettia paezensis also contribute to improved cardiovascular health by reducing the risk of heart disease and stroke, ultimately enhancing overall well-being and quality of life. By incorporating Neobartlettia paezensis into one's lifestyle, individuals can experience improved mental clarity, increased energy levels, and a stronger immune system, leading to a more vibrant and fulfilling life.
constituents: Neobartlettia paezensis has many active constituents, such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which provide various health benefits. The flavonoids present in this plant, including kaempferol and quercetin, have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, potentially reducing the risk of chronic diseases and improving cardiovascular health.
